name: uniguard-xt-root
description: Run dev/build from project root; app lives in frontend/

scripts.dev:backend:5001: bash -c 'source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend && PORT=5001 python app.py'
scripts.dev:doctr: bash -c 'source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend/doctr-main && uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --app-dir api'
scripts.dev:all: echo 'Run each service in a separate terminal: dev:frontend | dev:backend | dev:notify | dev:doctr (optional)'
